assertions.title: Aptos wallet selector/connect button behavior

steps.observed: Wallet selector modal opened from navbar Connect button

steps.expected: Aptos wallets (Petra/Nightly/Backpack) and keyless options (Google/Apple) are visible
steps.observed: Modal showed Petra, Nightly, Backpack plus Continue with Google and Continue with Apple

steps.expected: Wallet/account connect flow can proceed and eventually show connected state
steps.observed: Continue with Google opened Google Accounts OAuth in a new tab; end-to-end account completion was not possible in this headless validator context (no test account/extension auth completion)

evidence.consoleErrors: agent-browser errors reported 'Failed to fetch' (3x); console also showed unrelated external RPC/CORS warnings from Uniswap web3 providers

assertions.issues: Could not validate post-connect truncated Aptos address state headlessly due external wallet/account authentication limitations. Pre-connect UX states were verified.

steps.expected: CASH name/symbol and API-backed price are visible
steps.observed: Header displayed CASH/CAS with visible live price ($0.0966)
Chart rendered in viewport; DOM inspection found 7 visible canvases (sample canvas ~610x328), consistent with rendered chart area
Stats showed 1 day volume $142.35K, 52W high $0.2751, 52W low $0.0449

steps.expected: Description, contract address pill, explorer/website links visible
steps.observed: About text visible; contract pill 0xe66f...41d1 visible; Aptos Explorer and Website links present (Twitter also present)

steps.expected: CASH trades shown or valid empty-state
steps.observed: Transactions table populated with multiple Buy/Sell CASH trades (not empty)

evidence.consoleErrors: agent-browser errors reported 'Failed to fetch' (3x); console included recurring external RPC 403 and CORS warnings unrelated to local CASH API rendering
evidence.network: Browser-context fetch checks: GET /cash-api/market -> 200, GET /cash-api/candles?interval=1d -> 200, GET /cash-api/trades?limit=5 -> 200

frictions.description: agent-browser network request log returned no captured requests in this session, so API status validation was collected via in-page fetch checks instead
frictions.resolution: Executed browser-context fetch() checks for /cash-api/market, /cash-api/candles?interval=1d, /cash-api/trades?limit=5 and recorded returned HTTP 200 statuses

blockers.description: End-to-end wallet/account authentication could not be completed headlessly for post-connect address verification
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Validated modal options and attempted Continue with Google flow, which opened Google OAuth tab but could not be completed within isolated headless validator context

summary: Tested 2 assertions: INT-003 passed with populated CASH TDP data; INT-002 pre-connect wallet selector behavior passed but full post-connect state is blocked by headless auth limitations.
